name: Lotus Valley International School - Sector 50

address.Address: Nirvana Rd, behind North Close, Block M, South City II, Sector 50, Gurugram, Haryana 122018

address.streetAddress: Nirvana Rd, behind North Close, Block M, South City II, Sector 50, Gurugram, Haryana 122018

itemListElement.reviewBody: Grade 3, Pelicans Assembly's theme was quite apt given the current times. It was meticulously planned and every Kid performed so well. Most importantly, it is a great way to imbibe values and learnings in young learners. Super effort from all the kids and more so from Upasana Ma'am.

The assembly of Class 3 Pelicans was WoW!!!
The topic, the presentation, the dialogue delivery, the choir, the template and the dance presentation were simply amazing and marvelous. The effort put in by the class teacher and the staff was admirable.
Kudos to the kids & Upasana Ma'am!!

The event, The Wizard of Oz for grades IV and V, was an absolute spectacle, truly transporting us into a magical world. The impeccable execution of the costumes, songs and projections made it a memorable experience for everyone in the audience.

We are immensely grateful to Principal Ma’am for offering this platform to my son. A heartfelt thanks to Ritu Ma’am, Nilisha, Tamra, and Komal Ma’am for their incredible efforts in training the students. Their dedication and hard work were clearly reflected in the performance. We deeply appreciate the care and commitment that went into creating such an extraordinary event.

I am writing this review for the marvelous show, ‘The Wizard of oz- the adventure Odyssey’ presented by kids of Grade 4 and 5 on the annual day on 27th Sep 24 in LVIS, Gurgaon.

The entire show was absolutely a treat to the eyes, spectacular and breathtaking performance by talented kids who were given such a remarkable platform to unfold their wings. A show by 400+ kids together on stage, recreating the historic story of a century back with electrifying energy and enthusiasm.

Kudos to the all the teachers, musicians, front and backstage artists who put such extravaganza by working tirelessly over last two months.

Excellent and worth pondering message coming in from the show is, ‘If you look within yourself, you may be able to pull out the strength, courage, and intelligence you never knew you had.’

Mind-blowing and enchanting performance overall, Hats off !!

I want to extend my heartfelt congratulations to all the students and staff for putting together such a stellar annual show! The performances were nothing short of brilliant, showcasing not only the immense talent of the students but also the dedication and hard work of the teachers. Each act was filled with creativity, energy, and passion, a true testament to the school's commitment to nurturing young minds.

A special thanks to the teachers for their tireless efforts behind the scenes, guiding the students to reach such impressive heights. It's clear that the school provides an environment where both learning and creativity thrive. The show was a perfect reflection of the excellent work being done every day at the school. Well done to all involved!

It was mind blowing and awesome presentation put together by learner’s and faculty/ teachers of lotus valley school Gurugram. We as parent were amazed to witness the performance of 200 kids for almost 1:45 hours filled with joy and excitement. Excellent performance LVIS. Keep growing and doing such wonderful performances. Big shout out for learner of grade 4&5.

Lotus valley Gurgaon is an amazing school , giving importance to studies and co curricular’s in equal weights. Today they executed a flawless broadway ‘whizhard of oz’ and we couldn’t believe how hard the teachers and school had worked to train all the kids to come up with such a flawless performance and program. We are proud to have our child study in lotus valley Gurgaon.

I would like to extend my heartfelt thanks to the all the teachers specially Sameeksha Mam, Tamra mam and Ritu Mam for their incredible support and encouragement in motivating the children. The performance of "Wizard of Oz: An Adventure Odyssey" was a true musical extravaganza, with each child delivering a flawless performance with precision and passion. As a parent, I am beyond proud to be a part of this wonderful school family. Your dedication to nurturing the students' talents is deeply appreciated. Thank you!

I wanted to share my thoughts on the Annual Day performance of "The Wizard of Oz." It was absolutely delightful!

The kids brought the story to life with their vibrant performances and creativity. Each child showcased their talents, and it was heartwarming to see their confidence on stage. The costumes and set design were impressive and added to the magic of the story.

Thank you for your dedication in guiding the children through this production. It was a wonderful experience for both the kids and the audience. I truly appreciate the hard work that went into making this event a success!

Amazing grandparents day in Lotus Valley with kids welcoming grandparents with Gayatri mantra and dancing on old melodies.
Thanks Anjali and Anwesha Ma’am.
